summary: Frontend testing completed for Street Prime Detail landing page after code quality fixes. All 17 requested features verified and working correctly. Code quality improvements (hook dependencies, stable keys, extracted sub-components, shared constants, removed console.log) properly implemented without affecting UI functionality.
critical_code_review_comments: Code quality fixes properly implemented - no console.log statements found
Stable IDs used for trust badges (domicilio, premium, atencion, lgbtq), service cards (exterior, interior, premium, domicilio), reason cards (tiempo, cuidado, profesional, resultados)
Sub-components extracted: StarRating, ReviewCard, ReviewNavigation, PackageCard, VehicleSelector, UpsellButton, FormPackageButton, FormUpsellButton
Shared animation constants extracted to shared.jsx (hoverLiftSmall, hoverLiftLarge, viewportOnce, scaleIn, scaleNormal, etc.)
AffiliatedBrands carousel uses key={`${brand.name}-${index}`} which is acceptable for duplicated carousel items
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly after code quality refactoring. Key changes verified: 1) Hook dependency arrays fixed (useCallback/useMemo with proper deps), 2) Array index keys replaced with stable IDs where applicable, 3) Sub-components extracted to reduce cyclomatic complexity, 4) Inline motion objects extracted to shared.jsx constants, 5) Console statements removed. Google Reviews uses MOCKED fallback data (FALLBACK_REVIEWS array in server.py).

hero_section.details: Background image, WhatsApp CTA button (data-testid='hero-whatsapp-btn'), phone number (55 7250 2791) all present

trust_badges.details: 4 badges with stable IDs (domicilio, premium, atencion, lgbtq)

services_section.details: 4 service cards with stable IDs (exterior, interior, premium, domicilio)

pricing_section.details: 7 vehicle types, 3 packages, 5 upsells. Vehicle selector works, prices update correctly ($5,399 for SUV grande + Street Detail + 2 upsells), WhatsApp CTA appears after package selection

quote_form.details: All 5 fields render (name, phone, vehicle, model, message), 3 package buttons, 5 upsell toggles, submit button generates WhatsApp link

google_reviews.details: Star rating displayed via extracted StarRating component, navigation arrows working (data-testid='review-prev', 'review-next'), leave review link present

coverage_zone.details: Google Maps iframe present, 12 zone tags displayed

why_choose_us.details: 4 reason cards with stable IDs (tiempo, cuidado, profesional, resultados)

cta_section.details: WhatsApp button (data-testid='cta-whatsapp-btn') and phone number (55 7250 2791) present

affiliated_brands.details: 4 brands (Meguiar's, Armor All, Turtle Wax, Pro Elite) with infinite scroll carousel

social_links.details: 6 social media icons (Facebook, Instagram, Threads, TikTok, LinkedIn, Kick) with data-testid attributes

footer.details: Packages, services, contact info with email (contacto@streetprimedetail.com), legal links all present

whatsapp_float.details: Visible at bottom right with pulse animation

terms_page.details: /terminos renders correctly with 14 sections, business info, RFC (DIRJ900125E70), all legal content

privacy_page.details: /privacidad renders correctly with 12 sections, LFPDPPP reference, Meta Pixel disclosure

mocked_apis.google_reviews: Uses FALLBACK_REVIEWS array in server.py when Google Places API unavailable
